sentences.base_language: Sean and Seth arrive at a nice restaurant.
sentences.target_language: Sean和Seth到了一家不错的餐厅。
sentences.romanized: Sean hé Seth dào le yī jiā búcuò de cāntīng.

sentences.base_language: The waiter says, "welcome to a nice restaurant, how many."
sentences.target_language: 服务员说："欢迎来到这家餐厅，请问几位？"
sentences.romanized: fúwùyuán shuō: "huānyíng lái dào zhè jiā cāntīng, qǐngwèn jǐ wèi?"

sentences.base_language: Sean says, "a table for three, please."
sentences.target_language: Sean说："请给我们三个人的桌子。"
sentences.romanized: Sean shuō: "qǐng gěi wǒmen sān gè rén de zhuōzi."

sentences.base_language: The waiter asks, "is another person joining you."
sentences.target_language: 服务员问："还有人会来吗？"
sentences.romanized: fúwùyuán wèn: "hái yǒu rén huì lái ma?"

sentences.base_language: Seth says, "no, we just like the extra chair."
sentences.target_language: Seth说："没有，我们只是喜欢多一把椅子。"
sentences.romanized: Seth shuō: "méiyǒu, wǒmen zhǐshì xǐhuān duō yī bǎ yǐzi."

sentences.base_language: The waiter says, "cool. come this way."
sentences.target_language: 服务员说："好的，请跟我来。"
sentences.romanized: fúwùyuán shuō: "hǎo de, qǐng gēn wǒ lái."

sentences.base_language: They walk to the table.
sentences.target_language: 他们走到桌子旁。
sentences.romanized: tāmen zǒu dào zhuōzi páng.

sentences.base_language: The waiter asks, "would you like anything to drink."
sentences.target_language: 服务员问："请问要喝点什么？"
sentences.romanized: fúwùyuán wèn: "qǐngwèn yào hē diǎn shénme?"

sentences.base_language: Sean says, "yes, can we have 3 beers and water."
sentences.target_language: Sean说："好的，请给我们三杯啤酒和水。"
sentences.romanized: Sean shuō: "hǎo de, qǐng gěi wǒmen sān bēi píjiǔ hé shuǐ."

sentences.base_language: The waiter says, "Of course, I'll get those for you now."
sentences.target_language: 服务员说："当然，我马上给你们拿来。"
sentences.romanized: fúwùyuán shuō: "dāngrán, wǒ mǎshàng gěi nǐmen ná lái."

sentences.base_language: Sean and start talking and making jokes.
sentences.target_language: Sean和Seth开始聊天和开玩笑。
sentences.romanized: Sean hé Seth kāishǐ liáotiān hé kāi wánxiào.

sentences.base_language: After some time Shakira arrives.
sentences.target_language: 过了一会儿，Shakira来了。
sentences.romanized: guò le yīhuìr, Shakira lái le.

sentences.base_language: She says, "Hello, I am the famous singer Shakira. Can I sit here."
sentences.target_language: 她说："你好，我是著名歌手Shakira。我可以坐这里吗？"
sentences.romanized: tā shuō: "nǐhǎo, wǒ shì zhùmíng gēshǒu Shakira. wǒ kěyǐ zuò zhèlǐ ma?"

sentences.base_language: Sean says, "I don't know. We really like the extra chair."
sentences.target_language: Sean说："我不知道啊。我们真的很喜欢这把多余的椅子。"
sentences.romanized: Sean shuō: "wǒ bù zhīdào a. wǒmen zhēnde hěn xǐhuān zhè bǎ duōyú de yǐzi."

sentences.base_language: Shakira says, "But there are no other seats available. I am very hungry!"
sentences.target_language: Shakira说："但是没有其他座位了。我很饿！"
sentences.romanized: Shakira shuō: "dànshì méiyǒu qítā zuòwèi le. wǒ hěn è!"

sentences.base_language: Seth and Sean let her sit down.
sentences.target_language: Seth和Sean让她坐下了。
sentences.romanized: Seth hé Sean ràng tā zuò xià le.

sentences.base_language: Shakira, Seth, and Sean start to talk and make jokes.
sentences.target_language: Shakira、Seth和Sean开始聊天和开玩笑。
sentences.romanized: Shakira、Seth hé Sean kāishǐ liáotiān hé kāi wánxiào.

sentences.base_language: The waiter comes back and says, "oh no, you don't have an extra chair anymore."
sentences.target_language: 服务员回来说："哦不，你们没有多余的椅子了。"
sentences.romanized: fúwùyuán huílái shuō: "ò bù, nǐmen méiyǒu duōyú de yǐzi le."

sentences.base_language: Sean says, "Its ok, friends are better than chairs"
sentences.target_language: Sean说："没关系，朋友比椅子更重要。"
sentences.romanized: Sean shuō: "méi guānxi, péngyou bǐ yǐzi gèng zhòngyào."

sentences.base_language: Shakira smiles and says, "Le lo le lo le eh"
sentences.target_language: Shakira微笑着说："Le lo le lo le eh"
sentences.romanized: Shakira wēixiào zhe shuō: "Le lo le lo le eh"
